scripts.install-all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ..\electron && npm install
scripts.build-backend: cd backend && python -m PyInstaller --onefile --collect-all mediapipe --collect-all cv2 capstoneStat.py
scripts.start: npm run build-backend && npm run build-frontend && npm run copy-frontend && cd electron && npm start
scripts.dist: npm run build-backend && npm run build-frontend && npm run copy-frontend && cd electron && npm run dist
